headline: Masco Corp. (NYSE:MAS) Offers a Quality Dividend Worth More Than Its 1.72% Yield
summary: Investing in high dividend yields can be risky; prioritizing stable, growing payouts with strong financial health is safer. Masco Corp (MAS) offers a modest 1.72% yield with 18.19% annual dividend growth, low payout ratio, and solid profitability.
